name: Mews Property Management System API
what_it_does: Mews REST API (Connector API) for cloud-native hotel property management system. Enables AI agents to manage reservations, check-in/check-out, guest profiles, room inventory, rates and availability, billing, and housekeeping workflows. Mews is a modern cloud PMS used by hotels, hostels, and apartment operators globally, with a developer-friendly API ecosystem.
use_cases: Managing hotel reservations and room assignments from booking automation agents
Processing check-in and check-out from front desk automation agents
Integrating with channel managers and OTAs from distribution integration agents
Managing billing and payment processing from hospitality finance agents
not_for: Retail or food service POS without hotel property management
Simple booking calendar without full PMS integration
best_when: A hotel, hostel, or apartment operator using Mews wants AI agents to automate reservation management, front desk operations, and billing integrations.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest data including personal information, stay history, and payment data requires PCI-DSS and GDPR compliance. Hotel guest data is sensitive.

auth.notes: Mews uses Access Token authentication (a UUID per integration) passed in the request body or header. Each Mews enterprise (hotel) issues tokens to integrations. Tokens are property-scoped.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — property management SaaS; developer sandbox available
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property subscription pricing; integration marketplace for tech partners
pricing.notes: Czech company (Prague). Modern cloud PMS. Strong developer ecosystem. Tech partner marketplace allows certified integrations. Sandbox environment available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per access token; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest personal and payment data — PCI-DSS and GDPR compliance required
No public MCP server — REST Connector API with UUID access token
Access tokens are passed in request body (not header in some API versions) — check API docs
Czech company — GDPR native; EU-first data residency
Rate limits are per integration token — stay within documented limits for each property
Tech partner certification required to list in Mews Marketplace
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest PII and payment data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. Czech company — EU-first. UUID access token per property. Tech partner certification for marketplace.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest PII and payment data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. Czech company. UUID access token per property.
